message:
style: clippy + rustfmt cleanup in highlight.rs and kubectl.rs

Two small mechanical cleanups, both lint-driven:

- src/highlight.rs:875 — `contains("\\")` → `contains('\\')` in the
  highlight rendering test. Single-char string patterns trip
  clippy::single_char_pattern; the char form is what clippy suggests.
  Behaviorally identical (`str::contains` accepts both `&str` and
  `char` patterns).

- src/packs/kubernetes/kubectl.rs:586 — rustfmt collapsed a 4-line
  `assert_blocks(...)` call into a single line. Same pattern as the
  earlier rustfmt sweeps in 3403bf1 / e4e21de / ea9cfaa for the
  helm and kustomize tests.

No behavior change, no test logic touched.
